overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character walking through a snowy mountain landscape during a winter storm. The character traverses a winding trail past snow-covered boulders, pine trees, and stone cairns in a cinematic game environment with heavy snowfall and low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with large boulder formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow along a mountain trail, passing large rock formations on the left

entered.detail: massive snow-covered boulders lining the left side of the trail
sparse evergreen trees dusted with snow on the right hillside
narrow winding path covered in fresh snow showing footprints
hazy snow-capped peaks visible through the falling snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide snowy mountain valley flanked by massive snow-covered boulders on the left and scattered pine trees on the right. Heavy snowfall reduces visibility as the trail winds toward distant mountain peaks barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with valley views

events.description: exiting the boulder field and entering a denser forested area with more tree coverage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail through a more densely forested section with trees on both sides

entered.detail: thick cluster of snow-laden pine trees creating a forested corridor
snow-dusted rock formations emerging from the left hillside

segments.scene_description: Leaving the large boulders behind, the trail enters a more densely forested area with pine trees lining both sides. The path continues through moderate vegetation with rocky outcrops visible on the left, while distant mountains remain visible through the trees ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with stone trail markers

events.description: approaching stone cairns marking the mountain trail ahead
passing between large rock formations as the trail narrows

agents.ego_description: navigating past stone cairns through a narrow rocky passage with cliffs on both sides

entered.detail: stacked stone markers indicating the trail path through the snow
tall snow-covered rock walls enclosing the trail on the right

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows as it enters a rocky mountain pass marked by stone cairns. The character walks past these trail markers and continues through an enclosed passage with rocky cliffs rising on both sides, while the dense forest gives way to more rugged terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide, snowy mountain valley that gradually tightens into a rugged, enclosed rocky pass. It begins with the character traversing an open expanse flanked by massive snow-covered boulders and scattered pine trees under a heavy snowfall that obscures the distant peaks. As the path winds forward, the landscape shifts into a more densely forested area where pine trees line both sides of the trail and rocky outcrops emerge from the vegetation. The scene then narrows as the forest gives way to a stark mountain pass, leading the character past stone cairns and between towering rocky cliffs that enclose the terrain.
